title: Opening for Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd!
